nJ.description: Number of distinct apartment floor areas

K.description: Total number of floors in the tower

R.description: Number of apartments with floor area j in configuration v

O.description: Profit per apartment for sector i, floor area j, and owner h

area.description: Actual floor area value for area index j

m.description: Minimum floor area required for each sector i and owner h

a.description: Minimum fraction of total apartments that must belong to each sector i

s.description: Minimum average floor area required for apartments in each sector i

o.description: Minimum fraction of total apartments that must belong to each owner class h

hCorp.description: Index of the corporation owner class

assumptions.description: Number of distinct apartment floor areas is positive.
Number of owner classes is positive.
Number of floor configurations is positive.
Total number of floors is positive.

code.python: assert all(R[j][v] >= 0 for j in range(nJ) for v in range(nV))
assert all(area[j] >= 0 for j in range(nJ))
assert all(m[i][h] >= 0 for i in range(nI) for h in range(nH))

assumptions.description: Sector fraction lower bounds are non-negative.

code.python: assert all(a[i] >= 0 for i in range(nI))

assumptions.description: Average area lower bounds are non-negative.

code.python: assert all(s[i] >= 0 for i in range(nI))

assumptions.description: Ownership fraction lower bounds are non-negative.

code.python: assert all(o[h] >= 0 for h in range(nH))

assumptions.description: iFree is a valid sector index.
hCorp is a valid owner index.

x.description: Number of floors using configuration v with owner h

y.description: Number of apartments in sector i with floor area j and owner h

constraints.description: Total number of floors equals K.

code.gurobipy: model.addConstr(gp.quicksum(x[v, h] for v in range(nV) for h in range(nH)) == K)

constraints.description: Apartment-count consistency: for each area j and owner h, the total apartments of area j supplied by chosen configurations equals the total apartments of area j assigned to any sector.
constraints.formulation: \sum_{v \in V} R_{jv}\, x_{vh} = \sum_{i \in I} y_{ijh} \quad \forall j \in J,\; h \in H

code.gurobipy: model.addConstrs(gp.quicksum(R[j][v] * x[v, h] for v in range(nV)) == gp.quicksum(y[i, j, h] for i in range(nI)) for j in range(nJ) for h in range(nH))

constraints.description: Minimum fraction of total apartments that must be in sector i.
constraints.formulation: \sum_{j \in J} \sum_{h \in H} y_{ijh} \geq a_i \sum_{l \in I} \sum_{j \in J} \sum_{h \in H} y_{ljh} \quad \forall i \in I

code.gurobipy: model.addConstrs(gp.quicksum(y[i, j, h] for j in range(nJ) for h in range(nH)) >= a[i] * gp.quicksum(y[l, j, h] for l in range(nI) for j in range(nJ) for h in range(nH)) for i in range(nI))

constraints.description: Minimum average floor area for sector i.
constraints.formulation: \sum_{j \in J} \sum_{h \in H} \text{area}_j \cdot y_{ijh} \geq s_i \sum_{j \in J} \sum_{h \in H} y_{ijh} \quad \forall i \in I

code.gurobipy: model.addConstrs(gp.quicksum(area[j] * y[i, j, h] for j in range(nJ) for h in range(nH)) >= s[i] * gp.quicksum(y[i, j, h] for j in range(nJ) for h in range(nH)) for i in range(nI))

constraints.description: Apartments with area below minimum for (sector i, owner h) must be zero.
constraints.formulation: y_{ijh} = 0 \quad \forall i \in I,\; j \in J,\; h \in H \text{ with } \text{area}_j < m_{ih}

code.gurobipy: model.addConstrs(y[i, j, h] == 0 for i in range(nI) for j in range(nJ) for h in range(nH) if area[j] < m[i][h])

constraints.description: Corporations cannot own free sector apartments.

code.gurobipy: model.addConstrs(y[iFree, j, hCorp] == 0 for j in range(nJ))

constraints.description: Minimum fraction of total apartments for owner h.
constraints.formulation: \sum_{i \in I} \sum_{j \in J} y_{ijh} \geq o_h \sum_{i \in I} \sum_{j \in J} \sum_{h' \in H} y_{ijh'} \quad \forall h \in H

code.gurobipy: model.addConstrs(gp.quicksum(y[i, j, h] for i in range(nI) for j in range(nJ)) >= o[h] * gp.quicksum(y[i, j, hp] for i in range(nI) for j in range(nJ) for hp in range(nH)) for h in range(nH))
model.addConstrs(x[v, h] >= 0 for v in range(nV) for h in range(nH))

constraints.formulation: y_{ijh} \geq 0 \quad \forall i \in I,\; j \in J,\; h \in H

code.gurobipy: model.addConstrs(y[i, j, h] >= 0 for i in range(nI) for j in range(nJ) for h in range(nH))

objective.description: Maximize total profit from apartment assignments.

code.gurobipy:
model.setObjective(
    gp.quicksum(O[i][j][h] * y[i, j, h] for i in range(nI) for j in range(nJ) for h in range(nH)),
    GRB.MAXIMIZE
)
